name: monorepo-refactor
description: Inventory the full monorepo, then implement every eligible bounded refactor recommendation with goal checkpoints, behavior preservation, validation evidence, and rollback gates.

acceptance.description: Every implemented slice stays within its approved scope and configured limits.
Declared behavior invariants and applicable public/runtime contracts remain compatible.
Each slice has an atomic commit and a documented, independently usable rollback path.
Every eligible recommendation is implemented and validated, or has an evidence-backed fail-closed disposition.
No recommendation is silently left as a suggestion after inventory and ranking.
